scripts.check: npm run build -w @novel-ma/core && npm run build -w @novel-ma/agents && npm run check -w @novel-ma/core && npm run check -w @novel-ma/agents && npm run check -w @novel-ma/cli
scripts.build: npm run build -w @novel-ma/core && npm run build -w @novel-ma/agents && npm run build -w @novel-ma/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @novel-ma/core && npm run test -w @novel-ma/agents && npm run test -w @novel-ma/cli
scripts.bootstrap: npm run cli -- new '月球图书馆的守夜人与失忆AI' --chapters 3 --words 900
